headline: NATO's $40 Billion Counter-Drone Push Puts These Defense ETFs in Focus
summary: NATO's $40 billion counter-drone initiative is accelerating defense investment. Here's how ETFs offer exposure to the military drone industry.

raw.headline: NATO's $40 Billion Counter-Drone Push Puts These Defense ETFs in Focus

headline: Palantir Faces Potential Setback as France, Germany Seek European Military Software Supplier
summary: France and Germany are shifting toward sovereign defense software, testing France’s Arcadia system as an alternative to Palantir’s Maven and raising competitive pressure on US contractors.

raw.headline: Palantir Faces Potential Setback as France, Germany Seek European Military Software Supplier
raw.summary: France and Germany are shifting toward sovereign defense software, testing France’s Arcadia system as an alternative to Palantir’s Maven and raising competitive pressure on US contractors.
